fileMenu.firstVisitHint: Click GSC in the top-left for file actions like open, save, and settings.
fileMenu.installPwaHint: Install the browser app, not the desktop download

support.title: Support GSC
support.intro: GSC is free, open-source show-control software.
support.communityBefore: The project grows when people use it on real shows, report what breaks, and tell others about it. Source code and issues are on
support.funding: If you want to go a step further, buying a coffee helps carve out time for development.
support.buyMeACoffeeAria: Buy the developer a coffee (opens in a new tab)

installPwa.title: Install PWA
installPwa.desktopBody: Look for the install icon in your browser’s address bar, or open the browser menu and choose Install GSC / Install app.
installPwa.iosBody: In Safari, tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.

settings.title: Settings
settings.audioDesktopOnly: Audio output device selection is available in the desktop app.
settings.videoDesktopOnly: Video output settings are available in the desktop app.
settings.ndiDescription: Publish the program output window as an NDI source on your network. Learn more at
settings.ndiTrademark: NDI® is a registered trademark of Vizrt NDI AB.
settings.ndiUnavailable: NDI is not available. Install the NDI SDK and rebuild the desktop app with --features ndi.
settings.ndiOutputWindowHint: Open the output window so frames can be captured and sent.
settings.noMidiOutputsBrowser: No MIDI outputs found. Grant access when the browser prompts.
settings.noMidiInputsBrowser: No MIDI inputs found. Grant access when the browser prompts.
settings.noSerialPorts: No serial ports found. Plug in the Enttec interface and reopen Settings.
settings.webSerialUnavailable: Web Serial is not available in this browser
settings.storageUnavailable: Storage estimate unavailable in this browser.
settings.storageWarning: Storage is getting full. Export a backup from the file menu before importing large media.
settings.storageCritical: Storage is nearly full. Export a backup now to avoid losing your show.
settings.storagePersisted: Persistent storage granted — your show is less likely to be cleared by the browser.
settings.storageNotPersisted: Grant persistent storage by importing or editing a project so the browser keeps your show data.

remote.title: Remote control
remote.description: Let phones or tablets on the same Wi‑Fi fire cues from show mode. Scan the QR code or open the URL, then enter the PIN if prompted.
remote.qrAlt: QR code to connect a remote device
remote.buildHint: Production builds serve the remote UI from this app. Release builds bundle the UI automatically.
remote.devHint: Development: the remote UI loads from the Vite dev server (port 1421). WebSocket stays on the port above. Restart remote after changing the port.
remote.enterPinDescription: Enter the 6-digit PIN from the booth computer to connect this remote.
remote.missingPinUrlHint: Tip: use the QR code for one-tap setup with PIN included in the URL.

midiMap.description: Map incoming MIDI to transport actions. Mappings are saved with the project.
midiMap.pressControl: Press a control on your MIDI device…
midiMap.noMappings: No mappings yet. Use Learn or auto-map.

showMode.onTooltip: Show mode on — editing disabled. {{shortcut}} to exit.
showMode.enterTooltip: Enter show mode — lock editing for performance. {{shortcut}}

output.popupBlocked: Could not open output window. Allow popups for this site and try again.
output.noActiveVisualCues: No active video or image cues

startup.title: Open Project
startup.restoreDraftHint: Restore work from your last session
startup.description: Choose a recent project, browse for a file, or start a new show.

unsaved.title: Save changes?
unsaved.body: Do you want to save the changes you made to "{{projectName}}" before creating a new project?

dmxPreview.title: Keep preview changes?
dmxPreview.body: Apply the DMX levels you previewed on "{{cueName}}" to this cue, or revert to the saved levels?

cueList.emptyHint: Drag assets here to create cues, or use + Cue below.

cueRow.addFixturesToLightFade: Add fixtures and levels to this light fade
cueRow.assetWarningHint: {{title}} — drag from Assets onto this cue or the list
cueRow.stopGoOverlap: Stop and GO overlap — first in list wins
cueRow.orderConflictTooltip: A stop cue and a playback cue target the same cue in this group. Siblings run in list order — only the first one applies. Reorder children to change the outcome.

inspector.title: Inspector
inspector.emptyState: Select a cue to edit its properties.
inspector.displayNameHint: Always follows the target cue's name when that cue is renamed.
inspector.name: Name
inspector.sequenceHint: Steps run one after another. Each step can hold one or more parallel cues, with optional waits between steps.
inspector.parallelHint: All child cues fire together when this group is triggered.
inspector.noCuesInContainer: No cues in this sequence/group yet.
inspector.waitHint: Waits only run inside a sequence. Duration is in seconds.
inspector.stopHint: Stops the selected playback cue when this stop cue fires.
inspector.stopTargetMissing: Target cue missing — choose another cue or delete this stop cue.
inspector.lightFadeHint: Fades DMX levels on the reference light cue toward the levels defined here.
inspector.volumeFadeHint: Fades the target cue's volume from its current level to the value below.
inspector.opacityFadeHint: Fades the target cue's opacity from its current level to the value below.
inspector.panFadeHint: Fades the target cue's pan from its current position to the value below.
inspector.lightFadeChooseHint: Choose a light cue to load its fixtures, or add fixtures manually below.
inspector.fadeTargetInvalid: Target missing or invalid — choose a audio/video or video/image cue.
inspector.waveformRangeHint: Drag the in and out handles on the waveform, or enter times below.
inspector.imageRangeHint: Set how long the image stays visible.
inspector.numericRangeHint: Set in and out times in seconds.
inspector.loopInfiniteHint: Leave empty or ∞ for infinite looping.
inspector.loopFiniteHint: Number of times to repeat playback (after the first run).
inspector.oscDesktopOnly: OSC sending requires the desktop app.
inspector.oscArgsError: Use a JSON array like [1, "hello"], a quoted string, or comma-separated values.
inspector.patchFixturesFirst: Patch fixtures in the Fixtures panel before editing light levels.
inspector.dmxDesktopOnly: DMX output requires the desktop app.
inspector.addFixturesForLevels: Add fixtures to define this cue's levels.
inspector.previewPatchHint: Patch fixtures in the Fixtures panel to preview levels.
inspector.previewAddLevelsHint: Add fixtures and channel levels to preview.
inspector.previewDesktopHint: DMX preview requires the desktop app.
inspector.previewSnapshotHint: Snapshot current rig output as starting levels for this cue.
inspector.allFixturesInCue: All patched fixtures are already in this cue

assets.dropHint: Drop audio, video, or image files here…
assets.showModeHint: Assets are view-only in show mode.
assets.fileUnavailableTooltip: File not available — re-import this asset
assets.reimportBeforeCue: Re-import the file before adding as a cue
assets.dropOrImportHint: Drop a file below or import in Assets
assets.fileNotAvailable: File not available — re-import in Assets

fixtures.dropHint: Add fixtures with + Fixture below, or import a profile.
fixtures.showModeHint: Fixtures are view-only in show mode.
fixtures.name: Name
fixtures.extendsPast512: Fixture extends past channel 512 in this universe.
fixtures.dragToReposition: Drag fixtures to reposition. Press Done or Esc when finished.

dmxPanel.patchHint: Patch fixtures in the Fixtures panel to monitor DMX output.
dmxPanel.liveOutputHint: Live output levels from the current rig state, including active light cues and fades.

activeCues.empty: No active cues. Press GO to run the selected cue.

playback.assetNotLoadedImport: Asset not loaded — import the file in Assets.

notification.selectMidiOutput: Select a MIDI output in Settings before sending.
notification.oscDesktopOnly: OSC sending is only available in the desktop app.
notification.webMidiUnavailable: Web MIDI is not available in this browser.
notification.noMidiOutput: No MIDI output device is available.
notification.midiInputUnavailable: The selected MIDI input device is not available.
notification.webSerialUnavailable: Web Serial is not available in this browser.
notification.enttecNoWritableStream: Enttec Pro port has no writable stream.
notification.enttecUniverseLimit: Enttec Pro only supports universes 1 and 2 (got U{{universe}}).
notification.exportMissingAssets: Exported, but {{count}} asset(s) were missing from storage.
notification.openProjectFailed: Could not open the selected project.
notification.restoreProjectFailed: Could not restore the last project.
notification.browserSaveFailed: Could not save the project to browser storage.
notification.pathExistsError: "{{path}}" already exists and is not empty. Choose another name or location.

website.tagline: Cue-based stage control software. Run it in the browser or install the desktop app.
website.screenshotAlt: GSC edit mode showing cue lists, waveform editor, fixture preview, and GO controls
website.useCaseTheaterDesc: Run audio, video, and lighting cues from one booth. Sequences for scenes, parallel cues for transitions, and show mode on opening night.
website.useCaseConferenceDesc: Play walk-in music, speaker intros, and presentation video on cue. Send audience media to a second screen and run the program in show mode from the AV table.
website.useCaseInstallationDesc: Loop timed sequences of audio, video, and images. Trigger OSC or MIDI to interactives, lighting, or gallery gear without a full media-server stack.
website.contributionsBefore: Contributions are very welcome via the
website.featureAudioDesc: Play sound files from your project — WAV, MP3, and more — with trim and fade in/out.
website.featureVideoDesc: Roll video cues with in/out points and send them to the operator preview or audience output.
website.featureImageDesc: Show stills on the visual stage and output window for titles, backdrops, or interstitials.
website.featureMidiDesc: Send note, control change, and program change messages on GO to your MIDI gear.
website.featureOscDesc: Send Open Sound Control messages on GO — each cue carries its own destination, address, and arguments. Available in the desktop app only; not available in the web.
website.featureWaitDesc: Timed pauses between steps inside a sequence — hold the show without manual timing.
website.featureStopDesc: Stop specific playback or layers when you need a clean cut, not a full panic.
website.featureVolumeFadeDesc: Automate audio level changes over time with a dedicated fade cue.
website.featureOpacityFadeDesc: Automate visual opacity over time for video and image cues.
website.featureParallelDesc: A container for parallel cues — one GO fires every child in the group at the same time.
website.featureSequenceDesc: A container that runs steps in order — each step can hold one or more parallel cues, with waits between steps.
website.featureOrganizeDesc: Split long productions into multiple tabbed lists within a single project.
website.featureImportDesc: Drop WAV, MP3, MP4, PNG, and more into the asset library and wire them to cues.
website.featureTrimDesc: Set precise in and out points on audio and video with a visual editor.
website.featureGoDesc: Large GO and panic controls, keyboard shortcuts, and master volume for the booth.
website.featureActiveDesc: Active-cue panel, progress, and a live preview so you always know show state.
website.featureShowModeDesc: Hide editing chrome and focus on firing cues during the performance.
website.featureOutputDesc: Open a dedicated output window for audience video and images on another display.
website.featureRemoteViewDesc: Open a browser-based remote view to monitor active cues and show state from another device on your network.
website.featureControlDesc: Send MIDI and OSC from cues and map hardware to GO, cue select, and panic. OSC requires the desktop app — it is not available in the web.
website.featurePortableDesc: Export portable .gsc.zip bundles with media included for web or desktop.
